auth.phone.code_sent: Verification code sent to {phone}. Expires in {minutes} minutes.
auth.phone.code_expired: Verification code has expired. Please request a new code.
auth.phone.rate_limit: Too many code requests. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
auth.phone.invalid_format: Invalid phone number format. Use international E.164 format (e.g. +373XXXXXXXX).
auth.phone.too_many_attempts: Too many failed attempts. The account has been temporarily locked.
auth.mfa.setup_complete: Two-factor authentication has been set up successfully.
auth.mfa.invalid_code: Authentication code is invalid or has expired.
auth.mfa.backup_code_used: A backup code was used. {remaining} codes remaining.
auth.mfa.required: Two-factor authentication is required for this account.
auth.pin.set: Recovery PIN has been set successfully.
auth.pin.required_for_recovery: Enter your PIN to continue account recovery.
eevidence.emergency_acknowledged: Emergency order #{order_id} acknowledged. Response deadline: 8 hours.
eevidence.responded: Response to order #{order_id} has been transmitted to the requesting authority.
identity.evo_verified: Identity has been verified via EVO (e-Government Agency).
identity.mpass_login_redirect: Redirecting you to MPass for authentication. Please wait.
identity.idnp_consent_required: To continue, you must give explicit consent to disclose your IDNP.
identity.msign_signed: Document has been digitally signed with MSign. Identifier: {signature_id}.
disclosure.ai_act_art50: You are interacting with an MD-Chat AI agent. Pursuant to Article 50 of the EU AI Act, we inform you that this conversation takes place with an automated system.
disclosure.confidential_compute: This conversation runs inside a Confidential Computing environment. Data is encrypted even during processing.
disclosure.audit_trail: This action is recorded in an immutable audit log, as required by compliance regulations.
error.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
error.rate_limit: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
error.server_error: An internal error occurred. The technical team has been notified.
welcome.title: Welcome to MD-Chat
welcome.subtitle: Sovereign messaging for Moldova and the diaspora — under European jurisdiction.
